overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dystopian open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking through a post-industrial urban shantytown during golden hour. The environment features overgrown vegetation, makeshift vendor stalls, futuristic vending machines, and a massive crashed metal structure with purple lighting.

events.description: approach and pause briefly at vendor cooking table before turning

agents.ego_description: following the character in purple jacket and white visor as they approach a vendor at a makeshift cooking station

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing mask and sleeveless jacket preparing food at a table with bottles and cardboard boxes
pedestrian in white shirt walking past vending machines in the background

entered.detail: large rock formation serving as backdrop for vendor setup
makeshift table with red chair, cooking equipment, and scattered cardboard boxes
utility boxes painted with American flag design and peace symbols
green and blue futuristic vending machines with neon displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a shaded vendor area against a large rock outcrop. The camera follows a character toward a masked vendor cooking at a makeshift table, passing utility boxes painted with American flags. Futuristic vending machines line the left side of the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban path with vending machines

events.description: turn away from vendor and continue walking along the dirt path
pass concrete benches with seated NPCs and scattered trash

agents.ego_description: following the character as they walk past vending machines and concrete benches along the overgrown path

notable_agents.action: person sitting on white concrete bench along the path

entered.detail: white concrete benches placed along the right side of the path
tall cylindrical industrial building with large 07 marking visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the vendor area along a dirt path lined with futuristic vending machines on the left. Concrete benches appear on the right where NPCs are seated. The tall 07 building becomes visible in the distance as the path opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shantytown plaza with tall tower visible

events.description: enter more open area with large digital billboard and scattered trash piles visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the tall 07 building, passing more benches with seated individuals using phones

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench looking at phone or device

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying advertisements on the right side
piles of blue garbage bags stacked near makeshift fencing

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider plaza with the 07 building now prominently visible ahead. Large digital billboards and piles of blue trash bags line the route. The character passes benches where NPCs sit against a backdrop of overgrown grass and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: area with massive crashed metal structure

events.description: approach large crashed metal structure with purple internal lighting
turn left to navigate around the crashed structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward and around the massive crashed metal structure, observing the environment

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt standing near rocky terrain ahead

entered.detail: massive skeletal metal structure with purple lighting crashed at an angle
small yellow kiosk structures with solar panels on roofs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive crashed metal structure glowing with purple light that dominates the left side of the frame. Yellow kiosk booths appear on the right as the path curves around the wreckage. The environment becomes more cluttered with debris and makeshift structures.

events.description: navigate through area with large trash piles and debris
turn right past yellow booths toward open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through cluttered area with trash piles, passing other pedestrians and construction workers

notable_agents.action: person in yellow safety vest walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive piles of garbage bags and debris stacked along the path

segments.scene_description: The path winds through a cluttered area with massive trash piles on the right and yellow kiosks now on the left. The character passes a pedestrian in a yellow vest and navigates around a large green dumpster. The 07 building becomes visible again in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with steps and scattered debris

events.description: enter open plaza area with concrete steps and scattered cardboard

agents.ego_description: approaching open plaza with concrete steps, ending the sequence in the open area

entered.detail: wide concrete steps leading up to elevated area

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters an open plaza with wide concrete steps leading upward. The green dumpster is now on the left, and the area opens up with scattered cardboard debris on the ground. The 07 building remains visible in the distance as the sequence ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shaded shantytown market that gradually opens into a wide, urban plaza. It begins in a shadowed vendor area against a large rock outcrop, following a character past utility boxes painted with American flags toward a masked cook at a makeshift table. As the character moves away from the vendor, the scene shifts along a dirt path lined with futuristic vending machines and concrete benches where NPCs are seated. The environment then expands as the path opens up, revealing a prominent 07 building in the distance. Finally, the camera glides into a wider plaza filled with large digital billboards, piles of blue trash bags, and overgrown palm trees.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cluttered industrial shantytown that gradually opens into a wide concrete plaza. It begins as the character approaches a massive crashed metal structure glowing with purple light, while yellow kiosk booths emerge on the right as the path curves around the wreckage. As the camera winds deeper into the debris, the scene shifts to a narrow passage flanked by massive trash piles and yellow kiosks, passing a pedestrian in a yellow vest and a large green dumpster. The environment then expands as the character navigates past the dumpster and enters an open plaza with wide concrete steps and scattered cardboard. Finally, the view opens up completely, keeping the distant 07 building in sight as the movement concludes.
